headline: ADR-018 sterilization teardown COMPLETE + pushed green on claude/storybook-publishable-9tdovm (epic #80), awaiting lead review before merge. #51 legacy docs SPA stripped → Storybook-only (resolves #56); #49 portfolio deleted (apps/concrete + 47MB public/assets, archived on archive/portfolio); #50 local-AI bot layer cut (Modelfile/llm-stream-bridge/codemods/claude-config/docs-ai/AGENTS.md, archived on archive/local-ai) with llms.txt generation RETAINED per Adrian as core DS self-documentation; #53 root-doc sprawl consolidated 25→15 (10 stale deleted, durable content salvaged, 0 dangling doc-refs). CLAUDE.md leaned, guardrail registry pruned, ADR-018 §1/§3/§7 amended. Every commit green: build:lib, build-storybook, vitest (1059), smoke:consumer, verify-tokens+check-contrast, pretest, manifest/registry integrity. Earlier this run: 5 issues closed (#83/#59/#54/#62/#48); Chromatic publishing + lilac-bonds + MetadataList divided + Satoshi-only all live at 0.11.0.
next: Lead review of the teardown branch (8 commits ahead of main), then merge. Attended — not yet merged.

Adrian's 'couple more' follow-up cut: pipeline/ (still gated via pretest→check:figma-snapshot; needs the figma-masters dependency un-gated/migrated first), info-page.tsx + src/app/data/projects.ts dead-portfolio remnants (info-page hardcodes the deleted /assets/adrian.webp, degrades to placeholder), and dead docs/ subtree files (docs/LLM_STREAM_SCHEMA.md, docs/SYSTEM_ATLAS.md, docs/figma-plugin/EXECUTION_PLAN.md reference cut subsystems).

Deeper 'docs → 5' collapse: requires unwiring ~11 doc-generation/guardrail scripts (DESIGN-HANDOFF/CONSUMING/TOKEN_GOVERNANCE/SYSTEMS_REGISTRY/DECISIONS/OPERATING_MAP/TOKEN_MIGRATION generators). Deferred.

Non-blocking hygiene from #51: reconcile the 13 pre-existing check-validator-wiring drifts; prune stale paths from knip.config.ts; decide check-reduced-motion Layer-2 semantics for a library (no App.tsx root).
Deferred post-freeze: #60 (cva rollout), #64 (Astro evaluation). Human-owned: #47 (Figma Code Connect), #48 Figma text-style swap.
